Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5050/api/devices | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
devices = data.get\('devices', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data
print\('Number of devices:', len\(devices\)\)
for d in devices:
    did = d.get\('device_id', d.get\('id', d\)\)
    status = d.get\('status', ''\)
    print\(f'  {did} \({status}\)'\)
")
